user_goal: B031 LLM Gateway (Phase 2 起点 / Stream 3.A) — 把 aigc-gateway (本项目已有 MCP server 30+ tools) 接入 workbench backend，提供统一 chat completion 抽象层 + multi-tier model routing (Sonnet 主力 / Haiku 高频 / Flash news / Opus quarterly) + cost guard (¥1500/月 cap) + log 全请求。**不做** prompt template 设计 (留 Stream 3.C AI advisor MVP B036+) / safety eval 红队 (留 B032 = Stream 3.B) / 具体 AI advisor endpoint (留 B036) / 前端 UI 改动。Stream 3.A / Phase 2 起点 (implementation-path-2026-05.md §4 第六个 batch)。本批次 3 features：(F001) LLMGateway 抽象 + aigc-gateway HTTP client (不走 MCP) + ROUTING_TABLE 含 8+ task + AIGC_GATEWAY_API_KEY 四处接线 (v0.9.30 §12.9 遵守：.env.example + config.py + deploy.sh + bootstrap-env.yml) + 永久边界 (l) 守门业务代码不可硬编码 model name + pytest ≥12；(F002) MonthlyBudgetGuard (¥1500 cap / 80% alert / 100% halt) + llm_budget_log SQLite + alembic migration add_llm_budget_log_table + LLMGateway 集成 cost guard + pytest ≥10；(F003) Codex L1 + L2 真 VM 验收 + signoff。**永久硬边界 100% 继承 v0.9.31 + 新增 (l)(m)：** (l) LLM provider routing 不可硬编码 model name in 业务代码必须走 routing table + (m) LLM 月预算 cap ¥1500 enforced。决策矩阵 (2026-05-27 用户已批)：gateway 接入=aigc-gateway HTTP REST (不走 MCP) / 主力 model=Multi-tier routing per llm-provider-evaluation §5.2 / 月 cost cap=¥1500 (llm-provider-evaluation §6 推荐 + roadmap §2 上限) / 范围=纯 basic infra。受益 v0.9.27 §12.7.1 paths-trigger + v0.9.30 §12.9 secret 三处接线 (本批次 AIGC_GATEWAY_API_KEY 四处接线遵守) + v0.9.31 §16 §22 (本批次非 decommission)。B026 banner 仍 decommissioned 不破。F001+F002 generator，F003 codex。预估 1-2 个轻量-中型批次。Phase 1 终点 + 里程碑 A Layer 0→1 已达成；本批次启动 Phase 2 进入 Layer 1.5 AI-augmented advisory 基础设施。
evaluator_feedback: 2026-05-27 Codex completed B031 F003 reverify: PASS. L1 passed cleanly after fix-round 1: backend pytest 469 passed 2 skipped + ruff + mypy + alembic round-trip; trade pytest 778 + mypy; frontend vitest 172 + build + Playwright 38; npm audit remained moderate-only. Safety gates also remained green: AIGC_GATEWAY_API_KEY still wired in .env.example/settings.py/deploy.sh/bootstrap-env.yml, model-name boundary hits restricted to routing.py/fixtures/tests, and .next contained no gateway secret / host leakage. L2 passed on production: /api/health.version == main HEAD == f31c3027b5a42f4585783d69eb2f84ba290352c5; /etc/workbench/workbench.env contained AIGC_GATEWAY_API_KEY; sqlite returned llm_budget_log table; authenticated /api/debug/recent-errors returned count=0; VM smoke `LLMGateway().health_check()` returned True with BEFORE=0 / AFTER=0 proving no billing side effect; protected HTML checks on /strategies /reports /recommendations /risk all returned BANNER_ABSENT. Signoff report: docs/test-reports/B031-llm-gateway-signoff-2026-05-27.md.
generator_handoff: 2026-05-27 fix-round 1 交接给 Codex reverifying。【根因】F001 spec §4 invented a JSON envelope (`/chat` + `/embed` + `/balance`, fields like top-level `content` / `cost_usd_est` / `log_id`) that does NOT match the real production aigc-gateway. Live API is OpenAI-compatible: `POST /v1/chat/completions` returns `{choices:[{message:{content}}], usage:{prompt_tokens, completion_tokens}, model, id}`; `POST /v1/embeddings` returns `{data:[{embedding}], model, usage}`; `GET /v1/models` is the public unauthenticated catalog. Placeholder host `aigc-gateway.example.com` failed DNS on the VM. 【修复】workbench/backend/workbench_api/llm/gateway.py: AIGC_GATEWAY_BASE_URL = 'https://aigc.guangai.ai'; new CHAT_ROUTE / EMBED_ROUTE / HEALTH_ROUTE constants (/v1/chat/completions, /v1/embeddings, /v1/models); _parse_chat_result reads choices[0].message.content + usage.prompt_tokens/completion_tokens + payload.id (aigc_log_id); _parse_embedding_vectors reads data[].embedding. workbench_api/llm/routing.py: model IDs swapped to dotted form claude-haiku-4.5 / claude-sonnet-4.6 / claude-opus-4.7 / gemini-3-flash / bge-m3 (验证自 production /v1/models 2026-05-27); PRICE_TABLE 同步（gemini-3-flash $0.50/$3.00 + bge-m3 $0.084/$0 embedding）。__init__.py 暴露 3 个 ROUTE 常量。fixtures/* 改为 OpenAI envelope。【测试】test_llm_gateway: prod URL guard (not example.com) + endpoint path 守门 (/v1/chat/completions, /v1/embeddings, /v1/models) + OpenAI envelope choices/message/content/usage 解析 + 缺 choices vs 缺 message.content 两个错误路径 + embed 用 OpenAI data[].embedding 解析。test_llm_routing: dotted ID assertions + production gateway ID 守门测试 +1。fixtures sample_daily_advisor.json / sample_news_summarize.json / aigc_gateway_balance_response.json 全改为 OpenAI shape。【Gates】backend pytest 469 passed + 2 skipped（B031 F002 466 → +3 新测试）；ruff 0；mypy 158 files 0；alembic up/down OK；repo root 778 passed。【生产验证】请 Codex 重跑 production VM smoke `LLMGateway().health_check()`，应返回 True（GET https://aigc.guangai.ai/v1/models 200，确认 BEFORE=AFTER=0 仍成立）。【相关文件】commit 即将 push 给 main，包含：workbench_api/llm/gateway.py + routing.py + __init__.py + fixtures/* + tests/unit/test_llm_gateway.py + tests/unit/test_llm_routing.py + progress.json + .auto-memory/project-status.md。【未触动】F002 cost_guard.py / MonthlyBudgetGuard / llm_budget_log model+repo+migration 完全未改 — 这些与 endpoint/URL 无关，本轮专注 wiring。F001 secret 四处接线、安全 grep test、deploy.sh pre-flight 全保留。

session_notes.generator: 2026-05-27 fix-round 1 (Generator-side complete pre-push). 上轮 Codex 退回的硬 blocker = LLMGateway 用 placeholder base URL + invented HTTP schema，与真 aigc-gateway (OpenAI-compatible) 不匹配。本轮根因修复：(1) base URL → https://aigc.guangai.ai (production verified via curl /v1/models 200) + 3 个 route constants + 测试守门 'example.com' 不再出现。(2) endpoints → /v1/chat/completions + /v1/embeddings + /v1/models (health_check 不再调 /balance — 那是 project-scoped 的，需要 auth + project ID；改用公开 /v1/models 既验证可达又零计费)。(3) ChatResult 解析 OpenAI envelope (choices[0].message.content + usage.prompt_tokens/completion_tokens + payload.id 作 aigc_log_id)；embed 解析 data[].embedding。(4) ROUTING_TABLE+PRICE_TABLE 模型 ID 改 dotted form (claude-haiku-4.5 / claude-sonnet-4.6 / claude-opus-4.7 / gemini-3-flash / bge-m3) — 这是真 gateway /v1/models 的 ID 格式；dashed 'claude-haiku-4-5' 永远 400 invalid_parameter。fallback_news 改 gemini-3-flash；fallback_embedding 改 bge-m3 (gateway 当前唯一 embedding model)；删除 gemini-text-embedding-004 / cohere-embed-multilingual-v3 (gateway 不提供)。(5) fixtures 全改 OpenAI shape。Tests +3: prod URL 守门 + 真 gateway ID 守门 + 缺 message.content 错误路径。【未触动】F002 cost_guard / budget log / migration 完全未碰。【Gates】backend pytest 469+2 skipped / ruff 0 / mypy 158 files 0 / repo root 778 / alembic up-down OK。Commit & push 即将进行，然后等 Workbench Deploy 自动跑，最后 SSH VM 跑 health_check 验证真 reachability，再交给 Codex reverifying。
session_notes.evaluator: 2026-05-27 Codex completed B031 F003 fix-round-1 reverify and signed off the batch. Local results: backend pytest 469 passed 2 skipped, ruff pass, mypy pass, alembic round-trip pass; trade pytest 778 passed, mypy pass; frontend vitest 172 passed, build pass, Playwright 38 passed. Production results: /api/health.version matched local HEAD f31c3027b5a42f4585783d69eb2f84ba290352c5; VM env still contained AIGC_GATEWAY_API_KEY; sqlite confirmed llm_budget_log table; authenticated /api/debug/recent-errors returned 0; VM smoke `LLMGateway().health_check()` returned True and left llm_budget_log aggregate unchanged (BEFORE=0 / AFTER=0), satisfying the no-billing invariant. Protected-page HTML checks on /strategies, /reports, /recommendations, and /risk all showed BANNER_ABSENT, so B026 decommission remains intact. Final verdict: PASS; progress advanced to done.
